name: Filesystem
description: Read/write files, navigate directories, manage artifacts, persist data across sessions
notes: Proven for Manus (/home/ubuntu/ persistent, /tmp/ ephemeral). Unsupported for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini (no direct filesystem). Candidate for Codex (via tools).

chatgpt.note: No direct filesystem access. Indirect via task.create → Manus relay.

claude.note: No direct filesystem access in standard API mode.
